name: threejs-animation
description: Three.js animation — keyframe tracks, skeletal animation, morph targets, animation mixing and blending, GLTF clip playback, and procedural motion patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Three.js animation — keyframe tracks, skeletal animation, morph targets, animation mixing and blending, GLTF clip playback, and procedural motion patterns.
interface.longDescription: Build Three.js animations with AnimationMixer, AnimationClip, and AnimationAction, and blend or crossfade clips in the render loop.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Three.js Animation safely.
